title: Rename site to “femme forms” and boost glittery/shimmery theme

requirements.text: Rename the site/brand text shown in the UI from “Art Shop” / “Sensual Sketches & Feminine Art” to “femme forms”, including all visible header/footer/hero text and any remaining accessible labels or page metadata (e.g., document title) so the brand name is consistent across the app.

quotes: change the name of the site from Sensual Sketches and Feminine Art to the “femme forms

acceptanceCriteria: Header brand label shows “femme forms” instead of “Art Shop”.
Footer copyright line shows “femme forms” instead of “Art Shop”.
Home page hero headline shows “femme forms” instead of “Sensual Sketches & Feminine Art”.
Header logo image alt text and other user-facing labels referencing the old name are updated to “femme forms”.
The HTML document <title> is updated to reflect “femme forms”.

requirements.text: Increase the glittery/shimmery styling intensity across the site while keeping the existing rustic sketch + silver/metallic direction, by strengthening shimmer overlays/glows and applying the enhanced shimmer treatment consistently to key surfaces (header, hero, cards, and primary/outline buttons) without reducing readability.

quotes: make it more glitter and shimmery.

acceptanceCriteria: Shimmer overlay effect is visibly stronger than before on the header and hero background (e.g., increased shimmer opacity/contrast) while text remains readable.
Buttons using shimmer styles (e.g., primary CTA and outline buttons) have a noticeably stronger glitter/shimmer presence (e.g., stronger glow and/or animated shimmer) compared to the current build.
Card surfaces in listings/detail views show a consistent enhanced shimmer/glitter accent that matches the updated theme.
No layout regressions: navigation, mobile menu, and page content remain usable and legible in both light and dark modes.

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing UI components instead).
Keep all user-facing text in English (brand name “femme forms” as specified by the user).
nonGoals: Do not change backend canister APIs, data models, or authorization logic.
Do not add new storefront features (e.g., new product types, checkout/payments) beyond renaming and theme intensity updates.
Do not introduce new third-party services or integrations.
